data.title: [dso:brainstorm]: creating multiple epics -> scrutiny/fidelity pipeline skipped after first epic
data.description:
### 2. Incident Overview

* **Scenario Type:** User-Flagged Behavior

#### Expected Behavior

When /dso:brainstorm creates multiple epics in a single session, each epic must go through the full scrutiny/fidelity pipeline (epic scrutiny pipeline defined in plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md). The pipeline includes feasibility review, red/blue team review, and brainstorm sentinel creation. This must apply to every epic created — not just the first one.

#### Actual Behavior

The scrutiny/fidelity pipeline is applied to the first epic created in a multi-epic brainstorm session, but subsequent epics skip the pipeline and are created without scrutiny review. This means later epics may have unresolved FEASIBILITY_GAP signals or unvalidated success criteria that would normally be caught by the pipeline.

### 3. Action History and Workarounds

* **Known Workarounds:** Run /dso:brainstorm separately for each epic to ensure the pipeline runs for each one.
